commit_scope: Compress the regular current-branch ship path into one wrapper that owns rebase, evidence validation, local guard, PR follow-through, check waiting, API merge, branch cleanup, and optional deploy settling.

commands: python3 -m py_compile scripts/land_current_branch.py scripts/check_pr_followthrough.py api/app/services/agent_service_pipeline_status.py api/app/services/pipeline_advance_service.py api/tests/test_agent_control_plane.py api/tests/test_flow_pipeline.py

python3 scripts/land_current_branch.py --dry-run --merge -> would run current branch rebase, evidence validation, local PR guard, follow-through guard, push, PR create/read, check wait, API rebase merge, API branch delete

python3 -m ruff check scripts/land_current_branch.py scripts/check_pr_followthrough.py api/app/services/agent_service_pipeline_status.py api/app/services/pipeline_advance_service.py api/tests/test_agent_control_plane.py api/tests/test_flow_pipeline.py
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_control_plane.py tests/test_flow_pipeline.py -> 23 passed, 5 warnings
results: The landing wrapper compiles and dry-runs from the current branch without mutating the worktree.
The default merge method follows the documented API rebase merge path.
Dogfood caught the common branch-created-from-origin/main case; push now targets origin HEAD:<current-branch> unless the upstream already matches the current branch.
The stale PR auto-merge helper and API follow-through blocker now use the GitHub merge API instead of local gh pr merge checkout/cleanup.
The deploy phase prompt now points at the current-branch lander and deploy settle path instead of manual SSH deployment.

deploy_validation.reason: Runtime control-plane text changed; public deploy validation is pending merge/deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Control-plane follow-through and deploy task directions recommend the one-command current-branch/API landing path instead of local gh pr merge or manual SSH deployment.
test_flows: stale green PR blocker returns GitHub API merge/delete command
code-review auto-advance creates deploy task whose direction uses land_current_branch.py --merge --settle-deploy

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passes. Remote CI and deploy proof are pending until this process-only branch is committed, pushed, and landed.

evidence_refs: Previous loop strain observed in PR #3683: manual check polling, rebase churn, local gh pr merge cleanup failure, and post-rebase evidence rewrite.
API-only merge path: gh api -X PUT repos/<repo>/pulls/<number>/merge -f merge_method=<method>
Control-plane blocker now emits API-only merge/delete commands for stale green PRs.
Pipeline deploy phase now points to scripts/land_current_branch.py --merge --settle-deploy.
Manual fallback remains documented in docs/WORKTREE-QUICKSTART.md.
